project-0.Title: Personal Finance Tracker
project-0.Description: A web app to track expenses, income, and generate monthly reports with charts.
project-0.Next Small Implementation: Add dark mode toggle and improve mobile responsiveness.

project-1.Title: Discord Music Bot
project-1.Description: A Discord bot that plays music from YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud with queue management.
project-1.Notes: Using discord.py and yt-dlp. Hosted on a VPS.
Progress History: 2026-04-10: Playlist saving and shuffle features added

project-2.Title: WiFi Pineapple Clone
project-2.Description: Custom rogue access point for penetration testing with captive portal and deauth attacks.
project-2.Next Small Implementation: Implement automatic handshake capture and upload to Hashcat.
project-2.Notes: Running on Raspberry Pi 5 with Kali Linux tools.
Progress History: 2026-04-12: Captive portal with fake login page working
2026-03-25: Basic rogue AP and deauth attack scripts completed

project-3.Title: 2D Platformer Game
project-3.Description: Simple retro-style platformer with pixel art, enemies, and collectibles.
project-3.Next Small Implementation: Create basic player movement and jumping mechanics.
Progress History: 2026-04-01: Concept art and level design sketches done

project-4.Title: Automated Backup Script
project-4.Description: Python script that backs up important folders to cloud storage with encryption and versioning.
project-4.Notes: Uses rclone + age encryption. Runs daily via cron.

project-5.Title: Valorant Aim Trainer Cheat
project-5.Description: External aimbot with triggerbot and recoil control for practice in custom games only.

project-5.Notes: C++ with Windows API. Strictly for offline/training use.
Progress History: 2026-04-05: Basic triggerbot and FOV aim assist working

project-6.Title: Home Network Monitor
project-6.Description: Dashboard showing all devices on the network, bandwidth usage, and intrusion alerts.
project-6.Next Small Implementation: Add device identification using MAC OUI lookup.
project-6.Notes: Uses Scapy for packet sniffing and Flask backend.

project-7.Title: AI Meme Generator

project-8.Title: Password Manager
project-8.Description: Lightweight local password manager with AES-256 encryption and TOTP support.
project-8.Notes: Written in Rust. Uses SQLite with SQLCipher.
Progress History: 2025-12-20: Full encryption and export/import features completed
